name: :cloud: A curated list of awesome services, solutions and resources for serverless / nobackend applications.
description: :cloud: A curated list of awesome services, solutions and resources for serverless / nobackend applications.

links.title: AppDrag
links.description: Cloud Backend with SQL database and serverless API builder, Cloud CMS with domain management and email marketing tools

links.title: Firebase
links.description: Realtime database, authentication, hosting. A powerful platform for your mobile or web application.

links.title: Back4App
links.description: A Backend as a Service platform powered by Parse Open Source which you can use to build your app faster, host it with no hassles and keep full control over your Backend.

links.title: LeanCloud
links.description: Serverless cloud for lightning-fast development.

links.title: Nitric
links.description: An Open Source framework for rapidly building serverless applications.

links.title: Parse Server
links.description: Parse Server is an open source version of the Parse backend that can be deployed to any infrastructure that can run Node.js. You can find the source on the [GitHub repo](https://github.com/parse-community/parse-server).

links.title: wolkenkit
links.description: wolkenkit is a CQRS and event-sourcing framework for JavaScript and Node.js which fits perfectly with domain-driven design (DDD).
